free_text: POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE PARITY LEVEL STRUCTURES OF PT-194
FROM (N,N'GAMMA) REACTION SPECTROSCOPY
6.5-MV PULSED PROTON BEAM
42 GRAMS OF ENRICHED (97.4 PERCENT) PLATINUM POWDER IN
POLYETHYLENE CYLINDER.
COAXIAL GELI DETECTOR. SHIELDED FROM DIRECT
NEUTRON BEAM BY TUNGSTEN SHADOW BAR. SHIELDED FROM
BACKGROUND BY HOLLOW LEAD CYLINDER SURROUNDED BY
LI(2)CO(3) AND PARAFFIN.
LONG COUNTER USED TO MEASURE NEUTRON FLUX.
EU-152 AND CS-137 USED TO CALIBRATE DETECTOR.
TIME OF FLIGHT USED FOR NEUTRON FLUX MEASUREMENT.
SAMPLE SUSPENDED 6.3-CM FROM NEUTRON SOURCE.
CORRECTIONS MADE FOR GAMMA ABSORPTION IN SAMPLE,
NEUTRON ATTENUATION, AND MULTIPLE SCATTERING.
APPROVED BY S.W.YATES, 82/2/11.
ABSOLUTE CROSS SECTION DATA NOT AVAILABLE.
E.W.YATES, 83/10/28, WILL SEND UPDATED DATA.
STATUS CHANGE.
RELATIVE ERROR IN YIELD.
